citations.narrative:
There were 4 primary enclosures containing adult Basset Hounds, two housing the dam with her puppies, with significant
brown coating of dirt and grime along the walls of the sheltered housing. Dirt and grime was localized to the bottom third
portion of the kennel and extended along all indoor primary enclosure walls. The outer portion of the sheltered facility had
the buildup of dirt and grime located on doggie doors and on the left side of the wall adjacent to it.
All surfaces that have a buildup of dirt and grime can be a source of possible health hazards and bacteria due the them
not being able to be cleaned and sanitized properly. Hard surfaces with which the dogs or cats come in contact must be
spot-cleaned daily and sanitized in accordance with section 3.11(b).
Correct by Feb 10, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representatives.
n

narrative:
3.1(c)(3) 
   
Housing facilities, general. 
There were 4 primary enclosures containing adult Basset Hounds, two housing the dam with her puppies, with significant 
brown coating of dirt and grime along the walls of the sheltered housing. Dirt and grime was localized to the bottom third 
portion of the kennel and extended along all indoor primary enclosure walls. The outer portion of the sheltered facility had 
the buildup of dirt and grime located on doggie doors and on the left side of the wall adjacent to it.  
 
All surfaces that have a buildup of dirt and grime can be a source of possible health hazards and bacteria due the them 
not being able to be cleaned and sanitized properly. Hard surfaces with which the dogs or cats come in contact must be 
spot-cleaned daily and sanitized in accordance with section 3.11(b). 
 
Correct by Feb 10, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representatives.
